default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential upsell opportunities and strategies for the client Home Base](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Opportunity to significantly increase content production for Home Base from current 30-40 pieces/month to 1500-2000 pieces/year at a lower per word rate](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Propose a 12-month $25k/month retainer for the increased content volume](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Explore adding additional workstreams like newsletter, CRO, etc. as upsells](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Use Home Base as a model client to streamline processes and present to prospects like Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=560.0)
  - [Investigate more efficient content production workflows using AI tools](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

## Topics

### Increasing Home Base Content Volume

  - [Currently doing 30-40 pieces/month (\~400/year)](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Propose 12-month commitment for 1500-2000 pieces/year including refreshes at \~$0.05/word vs $0.10/word currently](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Accelerates their content goals at a lower cost](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Enough surface area for multiple years of content](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### Additional Workstreams as Upsells

  - [Newsletter workstream - launch newsletter, leverage existing email lists](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)

### Streamlining Processes

  - [Home Base is the best case study currently](https://fathom.video/share/h3PeFM1fRtteRhPXDhMfSC9Xsmsuca_E?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)

action_items.description: Try using SEO Writing AI or Koala to generate content, hire Ankit to set up automations and integrate with air table
Set expectations with clients that we are only providing content and workflows, not doing full integration work
